title: Author apple-pi organism with engine binding + sessionSchemaRefs
description: apple-pi is pi's identity executing on Apple FoundationModels via swift-apple-pi-cli's session model register — pi-semantics on a different inference engine. The harness needs its own v1.0.0 organism that articulates the engine binding: composition singular, profileType harness, aspects.harness only (no agent aspect, host-only like hulk/codex), runtimeKinds ["cli"], identity.inherits referencing pi, identity.extensions.engineBinding=FoundationModels with sessionSchemaRefs=[{family:pi-session-schemas, version:0.1.0}], implementation refs at swift-apple-pi-cli (ApplePiAgentTool, ApplePiSessionCompactionTool, ApplePiBeatCompactionTool, AppleIntelligenceAgentModel). Also fix the stale routing pointer in apple-pi's existing AGENTS.md/IDENTITY.md ("../../collectives/pi/" → "../pi/" since pi is now a harness, not a collective).
